## Summary

Describe the packaging change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited to this RPM packaging repository.
- [ ] The RPM builds successfully, or the reason it was not built is explained below.
- [ ] The install smoke test passes, or the reason it was not run is explained below.
- [ ] New runtime or build dependencies are package dependencies, not bundled downloads, unless justified below.
- [ ] Release artifact behavior is unchanged unless this PR intentionally changes it.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing commands or release steps changed.

Paste the commands or GitHub Actions run used to verify this change.

## Notes

Mention anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
